events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce exactly one valid JSON object per schema. Scenario: selected tool/material package for Connectors & fasteners matches size, rating, application shown on referenced sheet. Staged parts clean, intact, sized for work. Reference material Simpson catalogs, IRC. We must evaluate. Likely decision pass because staged and matches specs. Need fill fields. Need include references, findings, actions. Component condition categories that may apply none flagged; list empty. risk low. work_stage staged. percent_complete maybe 0 (work not begun). value 0. sound_source empty? schema string default maybe "" if not asked. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. Findings: parts match spec and are in good condition. Actions: proceed per manufacturer/IRC installation. Rationale. references. Ensure raw JSON no markdown. Need write to /app/answer.json in final? User says return exactly one JSON object. Should output raw JSON.
